archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Premium Fintech Soft-Utility

global_design_rules.aesthetic: Stripe/Revolut-inspired premium fintech. Pristine, trustworthy, and precise. Moving away from 0-radius brutalism to soft depth, nested radii, and optical clarity.
global_design_rules.border_radius: Main containers: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. Inner elements: rounded-lg or rounded-xl. Badges: rounded-full.
global_design_rules.shadows: Soft, diffused ambient shadows. Eliminate harsh offset shadows. Use shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)] for resting and shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.06)] for hover/elevation.
global_design_rules.borders: 1px delicate borders using border-slate-100 or border-slate-200 to define edges without heaviness.

typography.strategy: Geometric precision meets human readability. Replacing hard brutalist type with premium tech fonts.

WaveCard.container: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)] p-5 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] flex flex-col h-full
WaveCard.image_header: rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative aspect-video isolate mb-4
WaveCard.image_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-900/80 via-slate-900/20 to-transparent

Badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider gap-1

LiveCounter.container: flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700
LiveCounter.dot: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-[#FF5400] animate-pulse shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,84,0,0.6)]

Buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5400] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#E64A00] transition-colors shadow-sm shadow-[#FF5400]/20 inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
Buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2

StickyRightRail.container: sticky top-8 bg-white rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.06)] p-8 flex flex-col gap-6

motion_and_interactions.progress_bars: Use framer-motion for progress fills: initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${percentage}%` }} transition={{ type: 'spring', bounce: 0, duration: 1 }}
motion_and_interactions.live_counters: Use AnimatePresence to slide up/down numbers on change to show real-time momentum.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a deeper, softer shadow.

image_urls.description: Black and silver car wheel close up

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Replace all JetBrains Mono and Cabinet Grotesk fonts with Outfit (Headings) and Manrope (Body) via standard Tailwind classes.
2. Remove all hard shadow-brut classes and 0-radius borders. Apply rounded-2xl and soft drop shadows as defined in the components section.
3. Use framer-motion to animate the live wave progress bars and counters on WaveBrowse.jsx and WaveDetail.jsx.

4. Refine the color palette to use Slate (slate-50 to slate-900) for backgrounds and text, with the brand #FF5400 orange restricted strictly to primary CTAs and progress fills (do not use for general text).
5. Ensure the Sticky Right Rail on WaveDetail.jsx prominently features the live unit counter and savings band in a pristine, high-trust card format.
6. Include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='wave-card', data-testid='join-wave-cta') on all interactive elements.
7. Do NOT use pure black or fully transparent backgrounds over hero images. Use explicit gradients like bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-900/80 to-transparent.
8. Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with duotone or regular weights for a premium feel (e.g. MapPin, ChartBar, CheckCircle).
9. Build WaveBrowse.jsx and WaveDetail.jsx adhering strictly to the 'React 19 + Tailwind + Shadcn UI' constraint. Avoid raw HTML inputs; heavily customize Shadcn for form elements if needed.
